# libredash semantic-models query

Query a semantic model dataset

## Usage

```sh
libredash semantic-models query <model> <dataset> [flags]
```

## Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--body-json` | string | `` | request JSON body |
| `--target` | string | `` | LibreDash server URL |
| `--token` | string | `` | API token |

## Inherited options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--workspace` | string | `` | workspace id |
